name: pipeline-vertical-slice
description: Build an MVP-sized level with one core mechanic and basic polish.

stages.instructions: Freeze the player loop, acceptance criteria, platform, budgets, and out-of-scope list.
Research only dependencies required by the frozen slice.
Create the minimum environment and interaction assets.
Create PBR look development within the target render pipeline.
Compose visual layout and exportable scene references.
Export validated assets and record checksums.
Build the level and prefabs from manifest paths.
Implement the single core mechanic with the Input System.
Configure collision, movement, and interaction physics.
Add the minimum HUD, pause, and feedback UI.
Set target platform, build settings, and create a development build.
Run play-mode acceptance checks, capture console failures, and report regression status.
Verify hygiene, generated-file exclusions, LFS, and prepare release history.
